title: Smoky Brazilian Chicken
description: A flavorful and tender chicken dish with a smoky Brazilian twist, perfect for dinner.
instructions: Rinse the chicken breast and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the melted butter, smoky paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture evenly onto both sides of the chicken breast.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the chicken for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
